summary: Short clip of Senator Chuck Schumer standing at a lectern on the Senate floor beside a printed poster on an easel. The poster reads 'REPUBLICAN PLAN: $140 Billion more for ICE & Border Patrol / Zero Dollars to Lower Costs.' The audio is Schumer saying the plan adds funding for two groups, Border Patrol and ICE, that he says nobody respects. The tweet text quotes and criticizes that remark.

script.scene: Senator Schumer at a Senate-floor lectern beside a poster reading 'REPUBLICAN PLAN: $140 Billion more for ICE & Border Patrol / Zero Dollars to Lower Costs.'
